tts_lines.label: ElderMara_WaterSurvival
tts_lines.text: Water. Always find water first. The rivers here run north to south — follow the sound downhill. Where there is water, there is prey. Where there is prey, there are predators. Never camp on the riverbank. Drink, fill your skin, and move back into the treeline before dark.
tts_lines.trigger: Player approaches river for the first time — survival tip about water sources and predator proximity

tts_lines.label: ElderMara_BrachiosaurusWarning
tts_lines.text: That sound — low, rhythmic, like stones grinding underground. That is not the earth moving. That is a Brachiosaurus herd, two valleys over. They are calm now. But when they run, you will feel it before you hear it. The ground shakes. Get to high rock immediately. Do not try to outrun them in open ground.
tts_lines.trigger: Player first encounters distant Brachiosaurus herd rumble — teaches environmental audio reading
tts_lines.game_context: Dinosaur behavior awareness — herd stampede danger
